_meta.method: runtime validation (GAS preview via Playwright) + code audit + legacy cross-reference
_meta.revision: plan realigned to claps_codelab legacy decisions

_urgent_track.description: Save + GAS + PDF + Editor drag — the 4 deliverables needed for user-facing quotation parity
_urgent_track.dependency_chain: U-1 → U-3 → U-4 (serial). U-2 runs in parallel with U-1.

U-1-save.goal: Confirm button saves quotation with legacy-compatible behavior through a persistence boundary

03_runtime_wiring.focus: confirm/load integration with runtime save/load states

U-1-save.remaining: none - local disk mode and save wiring completed

U-2-editor.goal: Preserve current editor semantics and add basic timeline drag interactions incrementally

U-3-gas.goal: Port save/load to real Google Sheets using legacy-compatible GAS semantics

U-4-pdf.goal: Generate PDF from saved quotation ID using save-first legacy flow

_legacy_plans.note: Archived. Component-build phases are complete or deferred. Active work uses U-series plans.
